injectedDataSchemas: ActiveComponentAtlas (Existing related components via pgvector search)

inputValidation: Reject payloads exceeding maximum node depth (50 levels)
Strip unverified URLs from Figma text nodes to prevent prompt injection
outputValidation: Regex check: Output must not contain markdown code blocks (```) if raw JSON is requested
AST Parser: The generated string must compile cleanly using Babel/TypeScript parser
Secret Scanning: Reject outputs containing patterns matching internal API keys

reliability.heuristicFallback: Trigger the legacy v1 deterministic JSON-to-CSS template builder

humanReview.routingQueue: GitHub Pull Request: Require 1 Approval from @platform-ui-team

implicitFeedback: Percentage of AI-generated PRs merged without commit additions
Number of generated files modified within 24 hours of merge
